common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login.title: Sign in to the portal
login.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a sign-in link. No password to remember.
login.linkSent: Done! Check your inbox (and spam folder). The link is valid for 15 minutes.
login.invalidLink: This link is no longer valid. Please request a new one.
dash.title: Your documents
dash.progress.title: Where we are
dash.progress.done: All done! Our team is preparing your documents.
dash.coverage.title: Year coverage
dash.coverage.help: We need a statement for every month of the year, for each business account. Green months are covered.
upload.title: Upload bank statements
upload.help: Upload the PDF statements for your business account, downloaded from your bank's website. Readable photos or scans work too. You can upload several files at once.
upload.dropzone: Drag PDFs here or click to choose files
upload.processing: We're reading your statements. This takes a couple of minutes — you can close this page and come back later.
upload.notPdf: We can only accept PDF files.
upload.tooLarge: The file is too large (25 MB max).
q.title: A few questions about your business
q.intro: Bank statements don't tell the whole story. These questions help us prepare a complete, accurate balance sheet. No accounting jargon, promise. You can save and come back anytime.
q.section.opening.help: First year working with us? We need to know where we're starting from.
q.opening.firstYear: Is this the first year your company works with Altemore?
q.opening.hasPrior: Do you have last year's balance sheet from a previous accountant?
q.opening.hasPrior.help: If you have it, you'll be able to send it to us — it saves us rebuilding your numbers from scratch.
q.section.assets.help: Equipment, vehicles, furniture, or property bought this year are recorded differently from normal expenses. That's why we ask.
q.assets.confirm: Is this {amount} purchase on {date} at "{payee}" a long-term asset (equipment, vehicle, furniture, computer…)?
q.assets.any: Did you buy any other equipment, vehicles, furniture, or property this year that you don't see here?
q.section.loans.help: Loan payments are part principal and part interest, and they must be separated. A few details and we'll do the math.
q.loans.any: Does the business have any active loans or financing?
q.loans.currentBalance: Roughly how much is left to repay
q.loans.rate: Annual interest rate (if you know it)
q.section.ar.help: Invoices issued but not yet collected as of December 31. A rough total is perfectly fine.
q.ar.amount: At year end, how much did customers owe you in total?
q.section.ap.help: Unpaid supplier bills and credit card balances as of December 31.
q.ap.amount: At year end, how much did you owe suppliers in total?
q.ap.ccBalance: Business credit card balance at year end
q.section.inventory.help: Only if you sell physical products: the value of unsold goods at year end.
q.inventory.amount: Value (at cost) of inventory on hand at December 31
q.section.owner: Money between you and the business
q.section.owner.help: When you put money in or take money out, the tax treatment depends on why. Confirm these movements for us, one at a time.
q.owner.deposit: On {date}, {amount} came in ({desc}). What was it?
q.owner.withdrawal: On {date}, {amount} went out ({desc}). What was it?
q.flag.CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT: We see payments to a credit card ({desc}, {amount}). Do you have a business credit card? If so, upload those statements too — otherwise those expenses stay invisible and you lose deductions.
q.flag.CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT.yes: Yes, I'll upload the card statements
q.flag.CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT.no: No, it's not a business card
q.flag.LOW_CONFIDENCE: We're not sure how to classify this transaction: "{desc}" on {date}, {amount}. Can you tell us what it was?
q.flag.UNMATCHED_TRANSFER: This looks like a transfer ({desc}, {amount}) but we can't find the destination account. Do you have another business account to upload?
q.done.title: Thank you!
q.done.body: We have everything we need for now. Our team will review every answer before finalizing your documents. We'll let you know if anything else comes up.
